name: The Captain's Table House Salad
recipeIngredient: HEAD CHICKORY, CLEANED AND BROKEN INTO BITE-SIZE PIECES
BROCCOLI ROME ROSE, CLEANED AND BROKEN INTO BITE-SIZE PIECES
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and chop the head of chicory into bite-sized pieces.
2. Chop the romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
3. Shred the carrot.
4. Slice tomatoes into eighths.
5. Thinly slice cucumber.
6. In a large bowl, combine all chopped ingredients.
7. Drizzle with house vinaigrette dressing and toss gently to coat evenly.
